Permanent virtual launch party

AIZAT WORLD

The party that never ends. Welcome to JOMBUATZINE launch!

There is no schedule. There is no closing ceremony. Come in whenever. Play something, make something, leave a mark, get lost, return through another door.

OPEN ALL DAY: play, make, read, doodle, experiment, leave a message.

Main plaza

JOM.BUAT.ZINE

The flagship project sits in the middle of the universe. Every attraction can lead visitors back to one simple invitation: make your own zine.

A free digital zine maker

Make your digital zine. Download. Publish. Share. No permission needed, no official workshop required, no gatekeeper at the door.

Make a zine

Attraction district

AIZAT ARCADE

HTML games become arcade machines. Each machine can point to a game file, a hosted page, or a hidden prototype.

Game 01: Bukit Sapi — Serigala Lenggong

A Malay-language social deduction game. Someone on the hill is a wolf. Would you die on this hill?

Game 02: Copy Machine Ghost

A haunted photocopier keeps printing clues.

Game 03: Secret Stamp Club

Stamp your passport to unlock the back room.

More games coming. This arcade is permanently under construction.

Experiment zone

THE APP LAB

Tools, generators, pointless machines, useful machines, and things that probably should not exist.

SAJAK: AKU

A bilingual Malay-English poetry generator that turns your thoughts, feelings, and random words into an “I Am” poem — for self-expression, reflection, and a little poetic chaos.

Projek Mirror

Projek Mirror – a bilingual spin on the House-Tree-Person test. Originally developed by John Buck in 1948, it asks you to draw a house, a tree, and a person, then answer a set of questions. Meant to crack open what's inside—personality, emotions, the stuff you don't say out loud. We kept the bones. Just less shrink, more edge.

Menarot Harapan

78 kad berputar di atas roda. Apabila ia berhenti, empat kad memilih diri — tuahmu, jalan di hadapan, ujian yang menanti, dan rahsia yang tak kau duga. Dipilih dengan kerawakan kriptografi, daripada lebih 500 juta possible spread.

Archive district

ZINE LIBRARY

Your existing work becomes the history of AIZAT WORLD. Visitors are not viewing a portfolio; they are exploring an archive.

Workshop

MAKE SOMETHING

The central loop: visitor enters, makes a zine, shares it, the community sees it, visitor returns.

You don’t need permission.

You don’t need to attend a workshop.

You don’t need to know anyone.

You don’t need to be a “real artist.”

Just make a zine.

Mini zine launch pad

Back

Drag-and-drop your way to an 8-page zine, then print or download it. Opens right here — no separate tab, no losing your place.

Public space

COMMUNITY WALL

In a real shared Excalidraw, everyone draws on the same public wall. In this self-contained HTML, the doodle wall saves locally in the visitor’s browser.

Draw your imaginary creature.
What are you making right now?
Drop your favorite image idea.
Promote your project.
Say something controversial.
Leave something nice for a stranger.
Guestbook

YOU WERE HERE

Symbolic in the shared-map version, functional in this HTML version. Entries are stored locally in the visitor’s browser.

Hidden layer

SECRET DISTRICT

Clickable objects create game-like behavior. Some can lead to hidden apps, unlisted pages, lore, or secret downloads.

THE PERMANENT LOOP

The experience is designed so people can enter, make, play, leave evidence, discover secrets, and return when the world changes.
